title: handoff manifest artifact graph
purpose: B5.3 defines handoff manifest artifact graph for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B5.3` only; siblings under `B5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: After H1 approves a program milestone, program-scoper and integration-manifest-keeper produce the handoff manifest and artifact_graph listing which design nodes must exist before each implement lane may start and which integration tests gate program completion.

Before [orchestrate-program](../../../.cursor/skills/orchestrate-program/SKILL.md) spawns parallel lanes, the conductor reads the manifest and refuses spawn for any lane whose upstream artifact_graph nodes are absent, unverified, or still marked stale.

When upstream design or implementation changes a dependency, reconcile-artifact-graph marks affected nodes stale and pauses only the blocked lanes until reconciliation completes and state.json reflects cleared stale flags.

Each workstream records satisfied artifact_graph nodes and integration evidence in state under its lane lease ([C4.1](C4.1-workstreams-lane-json-leases.md)) so company-level goal_verify can roll up completion against manifest gates.

If the manifest human gate was never cleared, dependency edges cycle, or a lane starts without satisfied upstream nodes, pursuit stops at H2—never running uncoordinated parallel implement across streams.

Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `B5.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `B5.3`.

narrative: B5.3 defines handoff manifest artifact graph for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system after h1 approves a program milestone, program-scoper and integration-manifest-keeper produce the handoff manifest and artifact_graph listing which design nodes must exist before each implement lane may start and which integration tests gate program completion, then before [orchestrate-program](../../../.cursor/skills/orchestrate-program/skill.md) spawns parallel lanes, the conductor reads the manifest and refuses spawn for any lane whose upstream artifact_graph nodes are absent, unverified, or still marked stale.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Handoff manifest and artifact graph declare cross-workstream dependencies: which design nodes must exist before implement lanes start, which integration tests gate program completion. Program orchestration reads the manifest before parallel spawn ([orchestrate-program skill](../../../.cursor/skills/orchestrate-program/SKILL.md)).

Stale nodes in the graph trigger reconcile-artifact-graph before workers proceed. Handoff is the human-approved integration contract for multi-stream company goals.
